examples.title: Parameterized Constructor with Initialization List
examples.description: Demonstrates parameterized constructor using initialization list for efficient member initialization
examples.explanation: The constructor accepts two parameters and uses initialization list to directly initialize length and breadth members. This is more efficient than assignment in body.

examples.title: Constructor Overloading Example
examples.description: Shows multiple constructors with different parameter lists providing flexibility in object creation
examples.explanation: Three constructors are overloaded. Compiler selects which to call based on number of arguments provided during object creation.

examples.title: Copy Constructor
examples.description: Demonstrates copy constructor for creating object from another object
examples.explanation: Copy constructor is invoked when: initializing object from another object, passing object by value to function, returning object by value.

examples.title: Explicit Keyword Usage
examples.description: Demonstrates how explicit keyword prevents implicit conversions
examples.explanation: The explicit keyword prevents the compiler from using single-parameter constructors for implicit type conversions, making object creation intentional and explicit.
